text.title: Rust Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes a testable thing to its canonical test layer. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the scope of the thing under test?

conclusion.verdict: `#[cfg(test)] mod tests` inline next to the code
file under `tests/` exercising the public crate from outside
`///` doc block with `# Examples` runnable fenced block
`proptest!` block with size-bounded strategy; roundtrip when applicable
extract uncovered-lines via `cargo llvm-cov --json` and feed the test-author subagent

text.example: scope=parser-or-codec-invariant → proptest-on-parsers. Strategy: `prop::string::string_regex("[a-z]{0,16}")`. Property: `parse(serialize(x)) == x`. CI cases: 256; nightly: 4096.
